lore: §7Monsters you kill while you have this item will
§7drop their soul. You can click on their souls
§7on the ground using this item to absorb them
§7and then spawn them to fight by your side.
§7Mana cost is based on the power of the
§7monsters that you summon. Shift right-click to
§7view and remove souls from this item. If your
§7summoned monster dies the soul will be
